title: Use LLM prompt-construction indirection for page-image generation prompts
notes: Suggestion #7 from admin export (submitted by mannyrayner on 2026-05-04). Improve page-image quality by introducing AI indirection: pass style/page/context elements to a text model that composes the image-generation prompt, then send that prompt to the image model. Current direct Python prompt assembly appears to reduce text-image coherence and often yields unwanted text in images. Persist generated prompts in the same editable store currently used so users can review and manually refine prompts before image generation. Follow-up suggestion #7 from 2026-05-18 places this prompt-indirection work inside the broader page-image generation/review roadmap tracked as ISSUE-0017 and documented in `docs/roadmap/page-image-generation-improvements.md`; prompt indirection should support both initial page-image generation and organiser/community-informed regeneration.
